findings.evidence: `rg -n "Proof strategy|This uses|Uses uniform|built as the|with the `limsup` as witness|The proof uses" code/TauCeti/Probability/Martingale` hits Convergence.lean:45, Crossings/AntitoneLimit.lean:41, Crossings/AntitoneLimit.lean:287, SigmaAlgebraHelpers.lean:36, SigmaAlgebraHelpers.lean:87, TimeReversalCrossing.lean:171.
findings.fix: Rewrite these docstrings to state only the mathematical result/object; move proof strategy, witness-construction details, and alternative-proof discussion into ordinary comments or module implementation notes.
findings.issue: Several public declaration docstrings are proof notes: `condExp_tendsto_iInf` includes a five-step "Proof strategy" and an OrderDual proof discussion; the same pattern appears in `condExp_exists_ae_limit_antitone`, `ae_limit_is_condexp_iInf`, `aestronglyMeasurable_iInf_antitone`, `aestronglyMeasurable_sub_of_tendsto_ae`, and `timeReversal_crossing_bound`.

summary: The added files have module docs and public declarations are mostly documented, but several public theorem/lemma docstrings document proof strategy or witness construction rather than just the result.
